title: Oxford A4 Lever Arch Files, Pastels, Heavy Duty Folders, Laminated Paper on Board, Pink, Lilac & Mint (Pack of 3)
features: Durable and glossy A4 lever arch files: designed to offer a professional appearance and long-lasting protection for all your important documents, making them a stylish and practical choice for any workspace
Spacious 70 mm spine with a 56 mm capacity: can hold up to approximately 560 sheets of A4 paper, providing plenty of room to store reports, notes, or files in one convenient place
Strong metal lever arch mechanism and sturdy thumb hole: for smooth opening, secure document storage, and easy retrieval from shelves without damaging the file or surrounding items
Wipe-clean surface: resists dirt and moisture, allowing the file to stay looking neat and professional even with frequent handling
Ideal for both home and office use: offering a simple and reliable way to keep paperwork organised, protected, and easy to access whenever needed
